title: image: set MediaType in OCI manifests
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In image-spec 1.0.2, the `MediaType` field is now available in OCI manifests and indexes, so set it.

Update the `imgtype` helper to output the `MediaType` field as-is from OCI image manifests instead of just always supplying the expected value.

#### How to verify it

Updated test helper!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
